idea-plugin.name: JourneyKMP Graph
idea-plugin.description:
Visualizes @Journey-annotated sealed interfaces from JourneyKMP as interactive directed graphs.

Features:
  • Auto-detects all @Journey flows in your project
  • Interactive canvas with draggable nodes
  • Horizontal and vertical layout modes
  • Zoom in/out, fit to view, reset zoom
  • Piggyback tag visualization (ON_ENTER / ON_EXIT)
  • Export as Mermaid diagram or PNG
  • Light and dark theme support
